description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the crystallang/crystal:latest Docker image and caches the lib directory. Include a before_script that runs apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq libxml2-dev, then crystal -v and shards for each job. Define two jobs in the default test stage: a minitest job that executes crystal test/spec_test.cr, and a spec job that runs crystal spec. Both jobs inherit the before_script and use the cached lib path. No additional services, artifacts, or rules are required.
